The '*.zip' file below contains the original '*.dic' files obtained from the specified source URL.

    default_english_dic.zip
    https://github.com/bobbylight/SpellChecker/tree/master/SpellChecker/src/main/dist/english_dic
        Licensed under the GNU Lesser General Public License (LGPL) version 2.1 or later.
        https://github.com/bobbylight/SpellChecker/blob/master/SpellChecker/src/main/dist/Jazzy.LICENSE.txt
        https://github.com/bobbylight/SpellChecker/blob/master/SpellChecker/src/main/dist/Jazzy.CONTRIBUTORS.txt

----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

All the '*.zip' files below are generated from the '*.dic' and '*.aff' files in the tarball using
'<JxMake_Source_Root>/util/DictBuilder/Makefile'.

These files are not part of the JxMake main distribution. Please download them separately and place
them in the appropriate directory.

    de_DE_frami.zip
        Licensed under the GNU GPL v2 or the GNU LGPL v3.
        https://github.com/LibreOffice/dictionaries/blob/cp-25.04.7-4/de/README_de_DE_frami.txt

    en_AU.zip
    en_CA.zip
    en_GB.zip
    en_US.zip
    en_ZA.zip
    https://github.com/LibreOffice/dictionaries/archive/refs/tags/cp-25.04.7-4.tar.gz
        Licensed under the GNU General Public License (GPL) version 2 or later.
        https://github.com/LibreOffice/dictionaries/blob/cp-25.04.7-4/en/license.txt

    es_ES.zip
    https://github.com/LibreOffice/dictionaries/archive/refs/tags/cp-25.04.7-4.tar.gz
        Licensed under the GNU GPL v3 or later, the GNU LGPL v3 or later, or the MPL v1.1 or later.
        https://github.com/LibreOffice/dictionaries/blob/cp-25.04.7-4/es/LICENSE.md
        https://github.com/LibreOffice/dictionaries/blob/cp-25.04.7-4/es/README_hunspell_es.txt

    fr.zip
    https://github.com/LibreOffice/dictionaries/archive/refs/tags/cp-25.04.7-4.tar.gz
        Licensed under the Mozilla Public License (MPL) version  2.0.
        https://github.com/LibreOffice/dictionaries/blob/cp-25.04.7-4/fr_FR/README_fr.txt

    id_ID.zip
    https://github.com/LibreOffice/dictionaries/archive/refs/tags/cp-25.04.7-4.tar.gz
        Licensed under the GNU Lesser General Public License (LGPL) version 3 or later.
        https://github.com/LibreOffice/dictionaries/blob/cp-25.04.7-4/id/LICENSE-dict

        Licensed under the BSD (Revised) License or the CC Attribution 3.0 (Unported) License.
        https://github.com/LibreOffice/dictionaries/blob/cp-25.04.7-4/nl_NL/licentie_nl_NL.txt
